note: PoC: AI-generated TOEIC Part 1 questions from free stock photos (Pexels)

image_quality_assessment.lesson: Part1には人物の動作が写った画像が最適。風景のみ・アート系は不適。Pexels検索キーワードに'people'を含めるべき。

questions.scene: People reviewing charts and data at a table with laptop and tablet

choices.A: They are reviewing charts at a table.
choices.B: They are eating lunch in a conference room.
choices.C: A woman is writing on a whiteboard.
choices.D: The man is typing on a laptop.

explanation.A: Correct. Multiple people are looking at charts and graphs spread on the table, with a laptop and tablet also showing data.
explanation.B: Incorrect. There is no food on the table; they are working with documents and devices.
explanation.C: Incorrect. There is no whiteboard in the photo. The woman is sitting at the table.
explanation.D: Incorrect. The man is holding a pen and pointing at a document, not typing.

questions.scene: People in a meeting room, two women shaking hands across the table

choices.A: Everyone is standing around the table.
choices.B: Two women are shaking hands during a meeting.
choices.C: A man is giving a presentation to the group.
choices.D: The participants are leaving the room.

explanation.A: Incorrect. Most people are seated; only one woman is standing while shaking hands.
explanation.B: Correct. Two women are shaking hands across the conference table while others look on.
explanation.C: Incorrect. No one is giving a presentation; two women are greeting each other.
explanation.D: Incorrect. Everyone is gathered at the table, not leaving.

questions.scene: Interior of a cafe with empty tables, chairs, counter, and decorations

choices.A: Customers are seated at the tables.
choices.B: A waiter is serving food to a guest.
choices.C: The chairs are arranged around the tables in a cafe.

explanation.A: Incorrect. The tables are empty; no customers are visible.
explanation.B: Incorrect. There is no waiter or guest in the photo.
explanation.C: Correct. The photo shows a cafe interior with chairs neatly arranged around wooden tables.
explanation.D: Incorrect. The cafe appears to be in normal operating condition, not under renovation.

questions.scene: A construction worker wearing a hard hat and safety vest carrying heavy equipment

choices.A: The man is painting a wall at a construction site.
choices.B: Workers are taking a break on the ground.
choices.C: A foreman is inspecting the building plans.
choices.D: A worker is carrying equipment at a construction site.

explanation.A: Incorrect. The man is carrying heavy equipment, not painting.
explanation.B: Incorrect. The worker is actively working, not resting.
explanation.C: Incorrect. There are no building plans visible; the man is performing physical labor.
explanation.D: Correct. A construction worker in a hard hat and safety vest is carrying a heavy pipe or piece of equipment.

questions.scene: Supermarket produce section with displays of fruits and sale signs

choices.A: Fruits are displayed on shelves in a supermarket.
choices.B: A cashier is scanning items at the checkout counter.
choices.C: Shoppers are selecting vegetables from a bin.
choices.D: A store employee is stacking boxes in the aisle.

explanation.A: Correct. The photo shows a supermarket produce section with various fruits arranged on wooden display shelves, with price tags and sale signs.
explanation.B: Incorrect. There is no checkout counter in the photo.
explanation.C: Incorrect. While this is a produce area, no shoppers are actively selecting items in the frame.
explanation.D: Incorrect. No employee is visible stacking boxes.

questions.scene: Airport tarmac with airplane connected to jet bridge, ground vehicles, and passengers walking

choices.A: Passengers are boarding the airplane from the stairs.
choices.B: An airplane is parked at the gate at an airport.
choices.C: The runway is empty and ready for takeoff.
choices.D: Luggage is being loaded onto a conveyor belt inside the terminal.

explanation.A: Incorrect. The airplane is connected to a jet bridge, and passengers appear to be walking on the tarmac, but not boarding via stairs.
explanation.B: Correct. An airplane is parked at the airport gate, connected to a jet bridge, with ground service vehicles nearby.
explanation.C: Incorrect. This is not a runway; it is a gate area with an airplane parked.
explanation.D: Incorrect. The scene is outdoors on the tarmac, not inside the terminal.

questions.scene: Close-up of a hand holding a garden trowel full of soil near flowers

choices.A: A person is watering plants with a hose.
choices.B: Seeds are being planted in a pot.
choices.C: Someone is digging soil with a garden tool.
choices.D: Flowers are being arranged in a vase.

explanation.A: Incorrect. There is no hose or water visible; the person is using a trowel.
explanation.B: Incorrect. No pot or seeds are visible; the person is working in a garden bed.
explanation.C: Correct. A hand is holding a garden trowel loaded with soil, working among flowers in a garden.
explanation.D: Incorrect. The flowers are growing in the ground, not being arranged in a vase.

questions.scene: Library interior with bookshelves lining the wall, chairs and tables in background

choices.A: A librarian is organizing books on a cart.
choices.B: Students are studying at the tables.
choices.C: Books are scattered across the floor.
choices.D: Books are lined up on shelves in a library.

explanation.A: Incorrect. There is no librarian or cart visible in the photo.
explanation.B: Incorrect. The tables and chairs in the background are empty.
explanation.C: Incorrect. The books are neatly arranged on shelves, not scattered.
explanation.D: Correct. The photo shows rows of books neatly arranged on wooden library shelves, with a reading area visible in the background.
